keyPointsSummary: Body part pain uses 'have + a + ...ache' (headache, stomachache) or 'my ... hurts/is aching'
'has/have' introduces a disease/condition (He has diabetes / I have a cold)
'sore throat' and 'high fever' are fixed adjective + noun collocations

quickQuiz.hindi: मेरे कान में दर्द हो रहा है।

quickQuiz.answer: He has a very kind heart.

quickQuiz.hindi: मेरा पेट दर्द कर रहा है।

mustRememberRules: Body part pain uses 'have + a + ...ache' (headache, stomachache) or 'my ... hurts/is aching'
'has/have' introduces a disease/condition (He has diabetes / I have a cold)
'sore throat' and 'high fever' are fixed adjective + noun collocations
